emails.subject: Extend Deal
emails.body: Extend Deal During the month of June there is flow at meter 6347, but there is no deal. There is a deal in May (deal 290472), "Could you extend that deal for the month of June?"

emails.subject: Re: Extend Deal
emails.body: Re: Extend Deal I created a new deal to capture this flow. #333712 I also created a deal for July, #333718. D Ricky Ellis@ENRON 07/17/2000 03:09 PM
